heroDesc: Metal stamping service for volume forming of sheet parts
bodyTitle: Metal Stamping Service from flat strip to formed production parts
bodyDesc: Metal stamping is suitable for blanking, bending, drawing and forming sheet parts such as brackets, shields, springs, terminals and connectors. Review focuses on material thickness, springback, burr direction, tooling method and volume scale, so volume stamping should not be judged like one-off machining.

panels.title: Forming Method
panels.subtitle: Blank / Bend
panels.body: Select single-stage, compound or progressive tooling by shape and volume.

panels.title: Quality Focus
panels.subtitle: Burr / Springback
panels.body: Confirm burr direction, bend angle and elastic deformation.

panels.title: Volume Logic
panels.subtitle: Tool Amortization
panels.body: Higher volumes require attention to tool life and cycle time.

tableRows: Thick or high-strength material needs review
Selected by volume, geometry and cost
Process sequence affects dimension and appearance

steps.title: Flat pattern and material review
steps.body: Confirm material, thickness, grain direction, burr direction and critical dimensions.

steps.title: Tooling route selection
steps.body: Select single-stage, compound or progressive tool by geometry and volume.

steps.title: Trial stamping and correction
steps.body: Use samples to confirm dimensions, springback and appearance.

steps.title: Production
steps.body: Stabilize stamping rhythm and perform first article, patrol checks and packaging.

asideCta.title: Submit Requirements
asideCta.body: Upload drawings and project goals so engineers can review the service route.

related.title: Related Service Combinations
related.desc: Complex projects often combine multiple services. Review by geometry, volume, material and delivery goals.

items.title: CNC Machining Service
items.body: Milling, turning, mill-turn and hole-pattern machining for metal and engineering plastic parts.

items.title: Molding Service
items.body: Injection molding, tool trials, low-volume molding and design optimization for plastic parts.

items.title: Custom Manufacturing Service
items.body: Coordinates CNC, sheet metal, finishing, purchased parts and assembly for complex projects.

faq.title: Metal Stamping Service FAQ
faq.desc: These answers help clarify fit, input files and quotation review before submitting a manufacturing request.

items.q: What projects is Metal Stamping Service suitable for?
items.a: Metal Stamping Service is suitable for projects that need manufacturing review based on drawings, material, quantity, tolerances and delivery goals, especially prototypes, low-volume parts and functional components.

items.q: What information is needed for a Metal Stamping Service quote?
items.a: Prepare 3D files, 2D drawings when tolerances matter, material grade, quantity, finish requirements, inspection needs and target delivery timing so engineers can evaluate the route accurately.

items.q: How are lead time and cost confirmed for Metal Stamping Service?
items.a: Lead time and cost are confirmed after reviewing geometry, material, process route, finishing, inspection scope and order quantity. Complex tolerances or special finishes may require engineering confirmation.

ctaDesc: Share drawings and requirements — our engineers will recommend a stable process route.
